items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，prompts.chat这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch

items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: OmniGameArena: A Unified UE5 Benchmark for VLM Game Agents with Improvement Dynamics
items.title_cn: OmniGameArena ：具有改进动态的VLM游戏代理的统一UE5基准
items.summary: Vision-language model (VLM) agents are increasingly deployed in interactive game environments. Yet game benchmarks for VLM agents typically report a single first-attempt score per (agent, game) pair, focus on single-agent Solo play, and lack unified protocols for evaluating heterogeneous agent class...
items.summary_cn: 视觉语言模型（ VLM ）代理越来越多地部署在交互式游戏环境中。然而， VLM代理的游戏基准通常报告每个（代理、游戏）对的单个首次尝试分数，专注于单代理Solo游戏，并且缺乏用于评估异构代理类的统一协议...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: An Agency-Transferring Model-Free Policy Enhancement Technique
items.title_cn: 机构转让无模式政策强化技术
items.summary: Training reinforcement learning (RL) policies from scratch is   costly: it requires careful reward and environment design,   extensive tuning, and substantial computation.   Yet many control problems already have a functional but   suboptimal policy available as a baseline.   This paper proposes a m...
items.summary_cn: 从头开始训练强化学习（ RL ）策略是昂贵的：它需要仔细的奖励和环境设计、广泛的调整和大量的计算。然而，许多控制问题已经有一个功能性但次优的策略可用作基线。本文提出一个m...
items.comment: Meta/Llama系又放大招，社区狂欢，不过实际部署成本您考虑过吗？

items.title: PTL-Diffusion: Manifold-Aware Diffusion with Periodic Terminal Laws
items.title_cn: PTL扩散：具有周期性终端规律的歧管感知扩散
items.summary: Standard diffusion models typically use a single time-homogeneous Gaussian terminal distribution as the reference law for generation. While this choice is analytically convenient and empirically powerful, it provides little explicit structure for data concentrated near low-dimensional manifolds, whe...
items.summary_cn: 标准扩散模型通常使用单个时间齐次高斯终端分布作为生成的参考规律。虽然这种选择在分析上很方便，在经验上也很强大，但它为低维流形附近集中的数据提供了很少的显式结构，...
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。
